subject: Fermi  trigger No 737218721: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, V.Kornilov, E. Gorbovskoy, K. Zhirkov, N.Tyurina, P.Balanutsa, A.Kuznetsov, V.Senik,  D. Vlasenko,
G.Antipov, D.Zimnukhov, E.Minkina, A.Chasovnikov, V.Topolev, D.Kuvshinov, D. Cheryasov, Ya.Kechin, Yu.Tselik, A. Sosnovskij
(Lomonosov Moscow State University, SAI, Physics Department),

(Irkutsk State University, API),

(INAOE, Guillermo Haro Astrophysics Observatory),

A. Tlatov, D. Dormidontov
(Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),

V. Yurkov, A. Gabovich
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)

MASTER-Amur robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Russia (Blagoveshchensk State Pedagogical University) started inspect of the Fermi GRB240512.62 (trigger No 737218721,09h 46m 28.80s , +36d 21m 00.0s, R=5.41) errorbox  154 sec after notice time and 189 sec after trigger time at 2024-05-12 15:01:45 UT, with upper limit up to  17.7 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 54 deg. The sun  altitude  is -21.5 deg. 

MASTER-Tunka robotic telescope  located in Russia (Applied Physics Institute, Irkutsk State University) started inspect of the Fermi GRB240512.62 errorbox  4691 sec after notice time and 4726 sec after trigger time at 2024-05-12 16:17:22 UT, with upper limit up to  13.6 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 51 deg. The sun  altitude  is -20.0 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = 51 deg., longitude l = 188 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=2453636

We obtain a following upper limits.

The observation and reduction will continue. 
The message may be cited.
